body:
If you need someone **today** in Dublin, CA, there are several companies that are currently open and advertise same-day or emergency service.

Here are some strong options:

  * Boulevard Garage Doors, LLC — Open 24 hours, highly rated (5.0 with 500+ reviews), located on Dougherty Rd. Phone: **(925) 272-7900**.

  * Ace's Garage Door Repair & Installation — Open 24 hours and offers same-day repairs. Phone: **(925) 330-4751**. [Garage Door Repair Services in Dublin, Pleasanton & Livermore | Ace's](https://acesgaragedoorrepairdublin.com/repair-services/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Mr Garage Door Repair Dublin — Open 24 hours with same-day availability. Phone: **(925) 237-8542**.

  * The Door Doctor — Open 24 hours in nearby Pleasanton. Phone: **(925) 484-4290**.

  * R&S Overhead Garage Door, Inc. — 24/7 service with a large service area that includes the East Bay. Phone: **(510) 483-9700**.

Before you call, it helps to mention:

  * Whether the door is **stuck closed or open**.

  * Whether you hear the opener motor running.

  * If you noticed a **loud bang** before it stopped working (often indicates a broken spring).

  * Your garage door opener brand, if you know it.

One important safety note: if you suspect a **broken torsion spring** (a visible gap in the spring above the door), avoid trying to force the door open manually. Garage door springs are under very high tension and should be repaired by a technician.

If you tell me **what happens when you press the opener** (no sound, motor hums, door moves a few inches, flashing lights, etc.), I can help narrow down the problem while you're waiting for service.  

Give feedback
